main.h(3) Library Functions Manual main.h(3)

NAME

main.h

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct acds_config_t
Discovery server configuration.

Functions


int acds_main (void)
ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point.

Function Documentation

int acds_main (void )

ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point. Expects options already parsed and shared initialization complete. Called by main.c mode dispatcher after options_init() and asciichat_shared_init().

Returns

Exit code (0 = success, non-zero = error)

Definition at line 69 of file discovery-service/main.c.

69                     {
70   asciichat_error_t result;
71 
72   // Handle keepawake: check for mutual exclusivity and apply mode default
73   // Discovery-service default: keepawake DISABLED (use --keepawake to enable)
74   if (GET_OPTION(enable_keepawake) && GET_OPTION(disable_keepawake)) {
75     log_error("--keepawake and --no-keepawake are mutually exclusive");
76     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
77   }
78   if (GET_OPTION(enable_keepawake)) {
79     (void)platform_enable_keepawake();
80   }
81 
82   // Increase file descriptor limit for many concurrent connections
83 #ifdef __linux__
84   struct rlimit rl = {.rlim_cur = 65536, .rlim_max = 65536};
85   if (setrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE, &rl) < 0) {
86     log_warn("couldn't raise fd limit: %s", strerror(errno));
87   }
88 #elif defined(__APPLE__)
89   struct rlimit rl = {.rlim_cur = 10240, .rlim_max = RLIM_INFINITY};
90   setrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE, &rl);
91 #endif
92 
93   // Options already parsed and shared initialization complete (done by main.c)
94   const options_t *opts = options_get();
95 
96   log_info("ascii-chat Discovery Service (acds) starting...");
97   log_info("Version: %s (%s, %s)", ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_FULL, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_TYPE, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_DATE);
98 
99   // Initialize session string generator (libsodium)
100   result = acds_string_init();
101   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
102     log_error("Failed to initialize session string generator");
103     return result;
104   }
105 
106   // Load or generate identity keys
107   uint8_t public_key[32];
108   uint8_t secret_key[64];
109 
110   const char *acds_key_path = GET_OPTION(encrypt_key);
111   // If no key provided, use default path in config directory
112   char default_key_path[PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH] = {0};
113   if (!acds_key_path || acds_key_path[0] == '\0') {
114     const char *config_dir = get_config_dir();
115     if (config_dir) {
116       safe_snprintf(default_key_path, sizeof(default_key_path), "%sdiscovery_identity", config_dir);
117       acds_key_path = default_key_path;
118     }
119   }
120   log_info("Loading identity key from %s", acds_key_path);
121   result = acds_identity_load(acds_key_path, public_key, secret_key);
122 
123   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
124     log_info("Identity key not found, generating new key...");
125 
126     result = acds_identity_generate(public_key, secret_key);
127     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
128       log_error("Failed to generate identity key");
129       return result;
130     }
131 
132     result = acds_identity_save(acds_key_path, public_key, secret_key);
133     if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
134       log_error("Failed to save identity key to %s", acds_key_path);
135       return result;
136     }
137 
138     log_info("Saved new identity key to %s", acds_key_path);
139   }
140 
141   // Display server fingerprint
142   char fingerprint[65];
143   acds_identity_fingerprint(public_key, fingerprint);
144   log_info("Discovery server identity: SHA256:%s", fingerprint);
145   char msg[256];
146   safe_snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "🔑 Server fingerprint: SHA256:%s", fingerprint);
147   log_console(LOG_INFO, msg);
148 
149   // Create config from options for server initialization
150   acds_config_t config;
151   // Read validated port option (discovery-service listens on 'port', not 'acds_port')
152   int port_num = GET_OPTION(port);
153   if (port_num < 1 || port_num > 65535) {
154     log_error("Invalid port: %d (must be 1-65535)", port_num);
155     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
156   }
157   config.port = port_num;
158 
159   const char *address = opts && opts->address[0] != '\0' ? opts->address : "127.0.0.1";
160   const char *address6 = opts && opts->address6[0] != '\0' ? opts->address6 : "::1";
161   const char *log_file = opts && opts->log_file[0] != '\0' ? opts->log_file : "acds.log";
162   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.address, address, sizeof(config.address));
163   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.address6, address6, sizeof(config.address6));
164   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.database_path, GET_OPTION(discovery_database_path), sizeof(config.database_path));
165   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.key_path, acds_key_path, sizeof(config.key_path));
166   SAFE_STRNCPY(config.log_file, log_file, sizeof(config.log_file));
167   config.log_level = GET_OPTION(log_level);
168   config.require_server_identity = GET_OPTION(require_server_identity) != 0;
169   config.require_client_identity = GET_OPTION(require_client_identity) != 0;
170 
171   // Log security policy
172   if (config.require_server_identity) {
173     log_info("Security: Requiring signed identity from servers creating sessions");
174   }
175   if (config.require_client_identity) {
176     log_info("Security: Requiring signed identity from clients joining sessions");
177   }
178 
179   // Parse STUN servers from comma-separated list
180   config.stun_count = 0;
181   memset(config.stun_servers, 0, sizeof(config.stun_servers));
182   const char *stun_servers_str = GET_OPTION(stun_servers);
183   if (stun_servers_str && stun_servers_str[0] != '\0') {
184     char stun_copy[OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE];
185     SAFE_STRNCPY(stun_copy, stun_servers_str, sizeof(stun_copy));
186 
187     char *saveptr = NULL;
188     char *token = platform_strtok_r(stun_copy, ",", &saveptr);
189     while (token && config.stun_count < 4) {
190       // Trim whitespace
191       while (*token == ' ' || *token == '\t')
192         token++;
193       size_t len = strlen(token);
194       while (len > 0 && (token[len - 1] == ' ' || token[len - 1] == '\t')) {
195         token[--len] = '\0';
196       }
197 
198       if (len > 0 && len < sizeof(config.stun_servers[0].host)) {
199         config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host_len = (uint8_t)len;
200         SAFE_STRNCPY(config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host, token,
201                      sizeof(config.stun_servers[config.stun_count].host));
202         log_info("Added STUN server: %s", token);
203         config.stun_count++;
204       } else if (len > 0) {
205         log_warn("STUN server URL too long (max 63 chars): %s", token);
206       }
207 
208       token = platform_strtok_r(NULL, ",", &saveptr);
209     }
210   }
211 
212   // Parse TURN servers from comma-separated list
213   config.turn_count = 0;
214   memset(config.turn_servers, 0, sizeof(config.turn_servers));
215   const char *turn_servers_str = GET_OPTION(turn_servers);
216   const char *turn_username_str = GET_OPTION(turn_username);
217   const char *turn_credential_str = GET_OPTION(turn_credential);
218 
219   if (turn_servers_str && turn_servers_str[0] != '\0') {
220     char turn_copy[OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE];
221     SAFE_STRNCPY(turn_copy, turn_servers_str, sizeof(turn_copy));
222 
223     char *saveptr = NULL;
224     char *token = platform_strtok_r(turn_copy, ",", &saveptr);
225     while (token && config.turn_count < 4) {
226       // Trim whitespace
227       while (*token == ' ' || *token == '\t')
228         token++;
229       size_t len = strlen(token);
230       while (len > 0 && (token[len - 1] == ' ' || token[len - 1] == '\t')) {
231         token[--len] = '\0';
232       }
233 
234       if (len > 0 && len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].url)) {
235         config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url_len = (uint8_t)len;
236         SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url, token,
237                      sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].url));
238 
239         // Set username if provided
240         if (turn_username_str && turn_username_str[0] != '\0') {
241           size_t username_len = strlen(turn_username_str);
242           if (username_len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].username)) {
243             config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username_len = (uint8_t)username_len;
244             SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username, turn_username_str,
245                          sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].username));
246           }
247         }
248 
249         // Set credential if provided
250         if (turn_credential_str && turn_credential_str[0] != '\0') {
251           size_t credential_len = strlen(turn_credential_str);
252           if (credential_len < sizeof(config.turn_servers[0].credential)) {
253             config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential_len = (uint8_t)credential_len;
254             SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential, turn_credential_str,
255                          sizeof(config.turn_servers[config.turn_count].credential));
256           }
257         }
258 
259         log_info("Added TURN server: %s (username: %s)", token,
260                  turn_username_str && turn_username_str[0] ? turn_username_str : "<none>");
261         config.turn_count++;
262       } else if (len > 0) {
263         log_warn("TURN server URL too long (max 63 chars): %s", token);
264       }
265 
266       token = platform_strtok_r(NULL, ",", &saveptr);
267     }
268   }
269 
270   // Copy TURN secret for dynamic credential generation
271   const char *turn_secret_str = GET_OPTION(turn_secret);
272   if (turn_secret_str && turn_secret_str[0] != '\0') {
273     SAFE_STRNCPY(config.turn_secret, turn_secret_str, sizeof(config.turn_secret));
274     log_info("TURN dynamic credential generation enabled");
275   } else {
276     config.turn_secret[0] = '\0';
277   }
278 
279   // Initialize server
280   acds_server_t server;
281   memset(&server, 0, sizeof(server));
282   g_server = &server;
283 
284   result = acds_server_init(&server, &config);
285   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
286     log_error("Server initialization failed");
287     g_server = NULL;
288     return result;
289   }
290 
291   // Initialize WebSocket server (for browser clients)
292   websocket_server_config_t ws_config = {
293       .port = GET_OPTION(websocket_port),
294       .client_handler = acds_websocket_client_handler,
295       .user_data = &server,
296       .tls_cert_path = GET_OPTION(websocket_tls_cert),
297       .tls_key_path = GET_OPTION(websocket_tls_key),
298   };
299 
300   memset(&g_websocket_server, 0, sizeof(g_websocket_server));
301   asciichat_error_t ws_init_result = websocket_server_init(&g_websocket_server, &ws_config);
302   if (ws_init_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
303     log_warn("Failed to initialize WebSocket server - browser clients will not be supported");
304   } else {
305     log_info("WebSocket server initialized on port %d", GET_OPTION(websocket_port));
306   }
307 
308   // Initialize status tracking variables
309   g_discovery_start_time = time(NULL);
310   g_last_status_update = g_discovery_start_time;
311 
312   // Check if shutdown was requested during initialization
313   if (acds_should_exit()) {
314     log_info("Shutdown signal received during initialization, skipping server startup");
315     return 0;
316   }
317 
318   // =========================================================================
319   // UPnP Port Mapping (Quick Win for Direct TCP)
320   // =========================================================================
321   // Try to open port via UPnP so direct TCP works for ~70% of home users.
322   // If this fails, clients fall back to WebRTC automatically - not fatal.
323   //
324   // Strategy:
325   //   1. UPnP (works on ~90% of home routers)
326   //   2. NAT-PMP fallback (Apple routers)
327   //   3. If both fail: use ACDS + WebRTC (reliable, but slightly higher latency)
328 
329   // Check again before expensive UPnP initialization (might timeout trying to reach router)
330   if (acds_should_exit()) {
331     log_info("Shutdown signal received before UPnP initialization");
332     result = ASCIICHAT_OK;
333     goto cleanup_resources;
334   }
335 
336   if (GET_OPTION(enable_upnp)) {
337     asciichat_error_t upnp_result = nat_upnp_open(config.port, "ascii-chat ACDS", &g_upnp_ctx);
338 
339     if (upnp_result == ASCIICHAT_OK && g_upnp_ctx) {
340       char public_addr[22];
341       if (nat_upnp_get_address(g_upnp_ctx, public_addr, sizeof(public_addr)) == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
342         char msg[256];
343         safe_snprintf(msg, sizeof(msg), "🌐 Public endpoint: %s (direct TCP)", public_addr);
344         log_console(LOG_INFO, msg);
345         log_info("UPnP: Port mapping successful, public endpoint: %s", public_addr);
346       }
347     } else {
348       log_info("UPnP: Port mapping unavailable or failed - will use WebRTC fallback");
349       log_console(LOG_INFO, "📡 Clients behind strict NATs will use WebRTC fallback");
350     }
351   } else {
352     log_debug("UPnP: Disabled (use --upnp to enable automatic port mapping)");
353   }
354 
355   // Check if shutdown was requested before initializing mDNS
356   if (acds_should_exit()) {
357     log_info("Shutdown signal received before mDNS initialization");
358     result = ASCIICHAT_OK;
359     goto cleanup_resources;
360   }
361 
362   // Initialize mDNS for LAN discovery of ACDS server
363   // This allows clients on the local network to discover the discovery service itself
364 
365   log_debug("Initializing mDNS for ACDS LAN service discovery...");
366   g_mdns_ctx = asciichat_mdns_init();
367   if (!g_mdns_ctx) {
368     LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET("Failed to initialize mDNS (non-fatal, LAN discovery disabled)");
369     log_warn("mDNS disabled for ACDS - LAN discovery of discovery service will not be available");
370   } else {
371     // Advertise ACDS service on the LAN
372     // Build hostname if available
373     char hostname[256] = {0};
374     gethostname(hostname, sizeof(hostname) - 1);
375 
376     asciichat_mdns_service_t service = {
377         .name = "ascii-chat-Discovery-Service",
378         .type = "_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp",
379         .host = hostname,
380         .port = config.port,
381         .txt_records = NULL,
382         .txt_count = 0,
383     };
384 
385     asciichat_error_t mdns_advertise_result = asciichat_mdns_advertise(g_mdns_ctx, &service);
386     if (mdns_advertise_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
387       LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET("Failed to advertise ACDS mDNS service");
388       log_warn("mDNS advertising failed for ACDS - LAN discovery disabled");
389       asciichat_mdns_destroy(g_mdns_ctx);
390       g_mdns_ctx = NULL;
391     } else {
392       log_console(LOG_INFO, "🌐 mDNS: ACDS advertised as '_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp.local' on LAN");
393       log_info("mDNS: ACDS advertised as '_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp.local' (port=%d)", config.port);
394     }
395   }
396 
397   // Install signal handlers for clean shutdown
398   signal(SIGINT, acds_handle_signal);
399   signal(SIGTERM, acds_handle_signal);
400 
401 
402   // Run server
403   result = acds_server_run(&server);
404   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
405     log_error("Server run failed");
406   }
407 
408 cleanup_resources:
409   // Cleanup
410   // Disable keepawake before exit
411   platform_disable_keepawake();
412 
413   log_info("Shutting down discovery server...");
414   acds_server_shutdown(&server);
415   g_server = NULL;
416 
417   // Destroy WebSocket server
418   websocket_server_destroy(&g_websocket_server);
419   log_debug("WebSocket server destroyed");
420 
421   // Clean up UPnP port mapping
422   if (g_upnp_ctx) {
423     nat_upnp_close(&g_upnp_ctx);
424     log_debug("UPnP port mapping closed");
425   }
426 
427   // Clean up mDNS context
428   if (g_mdns_ctx) {
429     asciichat_mdns_destroy(g_mdns_ctx);
430     g_mdns_ctx = NULL;
431     log_debug("mDNS context shut down");
432   }
433 
434   log_info("Discovery server stopped");
435   return result;
436 }




References acds_identity_fingerprint(),
    acds_identity_generate(), acds_identity_load(),
    acds_identity_save(), acds_server_init(),
    acds_server_run(), acds_server_shutdown(),
    acds_string_init(), acds_websocket_client_handler(),
    acds_config_t::address, options_state::address,
    acds_config_t::address6, options_state::address6,
    ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_DATE, ASCII_CHAT_BUILD_TYPE,
    ASCII_CHAT_VERSION_FULL, asciichat_mdns_advertise(),
    asciichat_mdns_destroy(), asciichat_mdns_init(),
    ASCIICHAT_OK, acds_config_t::database_path, errno,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, get_config_dir(), GET_OPTION,
    acds_config_t::key_path, log_console, log_debug,
    LOG_ERRNO_IF_SET, log_error, acds_config_t::log_file,
    log_file, options_state::log_file, LOG_INFO,
    log_info, acds_config_t::log_level, log_warn,
    nat_upnp_close(), nat_upnp_get_address(),
    nat_upnp_open(), OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE, options_get(),
    platform_disable_keepawake(), platform_enable_keepawake(),
    PLATFORM_MAX_PATH_LENGTH, platform_strtok_r(),
    acds_config_t::port, acds_config_t::require_client_identity,
    acds_config_t::require_server_identity, safe_snprintf(),
    SAFE_STRNCPY, acds_config_t::stun_count,
    acds_config_t::stun_servers, acds_config_t::turn_count,
    acds_config_t::turn_secret, acds_config_t::turn_servers,
    websocket_server_destroy(), and websocket_server_init().








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.9.4
    ascii-chat
